subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The face of My loving-kindness hath been turned toward thee, and I make mention of that which shall be a treasure unto thee in My realms. Rejoice thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد توجه الیک وجه عنایتی و یذکرک بما یکون کنزا لک فی ممالکی ان افرحی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
